data: {"items": [{"word": "scene", "definition": "A view or picture of a place, event, or activity.", "example": "The picture shows a busy street scene.", "image": "520", "partOfSpeech": "noun"}, {"word": "cafe", "definition": "A small restaurant where you can buy drinks and simple meals.", "example": "A man is reading a newspaper at the cafe.", "image": "520", "partOfSpeech": "noun"}, {"word": "litter bin", "definition": "A container in a public place for people to put their rubbish in.", "example": "Please put your empty bottle in the litter bin.", "image": "520", "partOfSpeech": "noun"}, {"word": "pavement", "definition": "A flat part at the side of a road for people to walk on.", "example": "The girls are walking on the pavement.", "image": "520", "partOfSpeech": "noun"}, {"word": "traffic lights", "definition": "A set of red, yellow, and green lights that control traffic.", "example": "The cars stopped at the traffic lights.", "image": "526", "partOfSpeech": "noun"}, {"word": "bakery", "definition": "A place where bread and cakes are made and sold.", "example": "You can see a bakery in the picture.", "image": "520", "partOfSpeech": "noun"}]}

{"items": [{"word": "come round", "definition": "to visit someone in their home", "example": "If I finish my homework, I'll come round to your house later.", "partOfSpeech": "verb", "image": "gen-g10-u1-1.10-img-1"}]}

{"items": [{"word": "decide", "definition": "to make a choice about something", "example": "He decided to go to the take-away.", "partOfSpeech": "verb", "audio": "decide.mp3"}, {"word": "hungry", "definition": "feeling that you want to eat something", "example": "Yousif was hungry.", "partOfSpeech": "adjective", "audio": "hungry.mp3"}, {"word": "kitchen", "definition": "a room where food is cooked", "example": "He went into the kitchen.", "partOfSpeech": "noun", "audio": "kitchen.mp3"}, {"word": "sandwich", "definition": "two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or other filling between them", "example": "He made himself a sandwich.", "partOfSpeech": "noun", "audio": "sandwich.mp3"}, {"word": "take-away", "definition": "a restaurant that cooks and sells food that you take away and eat somewhere else", "example": "He decided to go to the take-away.", "partOfSpeech": "noun", "audio": "take-away.mp3"}, {"word": "burger", "definition": "a flat, round piece of ground meat that is cooked and eaten in a bread roll", "example": "He got a burger.", "partOfSpeech": "noun", "audio": "burger.mp3"}]}
